description: Real-artifact case study: the LNS (Logarithmic Number System) log8 MAC from the author's 2024 MS project (SJSU EE297B), snapshot of the 2026 fixed datapath. csim already PASSES against a double-precision golden model; the optimize loop should regenerate honest post-fix PPA and find pragma headroom on mac_nxn_array without breaking the datapath.
expected: csim_pass=true on the base design; optimize improves the satisfice_then_area score while csim stays true

numerics.note: Enforced by the testbench itself: |dut - golden| <= 5%|golden| + 1% sum|products| + 2^-8, golden = double-precision MAC of the QUANTIZED (LNS-grid) inputs, so datapath error only. Deterministic seeds; 10k randomized trials + directed edge cases (exact zero, sub-unity, cancellation, underflow flush, overflow saturation).
